Heading Size Restoration

Expected behavior:

  • Default headings inside <small> should still look like headings, not like tiny body text.
  • After the heading, text should return to the surrounding <small> size.
  • Explicit heading CSS should keep resolving against the inherited context for now.
  • The Publisher font sizes toggle should not break the default heading document-base fix.

Normal text before normal headings.

Normal H1

Normal H2

Normal H3

Normal text before small block.

This is text inside a small block.

Heading inside small (H2)

This is text after the H2 inside the small block.

Heading inside small (H1)

This is text after the H1 inside the small block.

Explicit CSS H2 inside small (1.3em)

This is text after the explicit CSS H2.

Normal text after small block.

This is text inside a big block.

Heading inside big (H2)

This is text after the H2 inside the big block.

Normal text after big block.
